prompt: Hand category: overpair. Board fit: the board is low and unpaired, so the made hand still sits above the visible board. Classify the range bucket.
why_v1: Strong means the made hand remains above the board and is not just a thin pair.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. This is strong because an overpair is a made hand that still sits above a low unpaired board.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. This is strong because the board fit keeps the overpair ahead of many one-pair hands.
